title: Run Ledger Entry
description: Unified schema for run ledger entries across all three gates (canonicalization, registry_enforcement, promotion_gate). Each entry captures the full lifecycle of a gate run including trigger, decision, findings, artifacts, and evidence references.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for this run. UUID or ISO8601-based (e.g. 20260310T120000Z).

gate_type.description: Which gate produced this ledger entry.

repo.description: Primary repository path that was evaluated.

related_repo.description: Related repository path (e.g. derivative repo for promotion_gate). Empty string if not applicable.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the run started.

finished_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the run finished.

decision.description: Final gate decision. pass=clean, warn=non-blocking issues, deny=blocking issues, error=gate itself failed.

severity_summary.description: Aggregated severity counts across all findings.

findings_count.description: Total number of findings (must equal severity_summary.total_findings).

findings.description: Detailed list of all findings from this gate run.

id.description: Unique identifier for this finding within the run.

class.description: Classification of the finding (e.g. missing_artifact, hash_mismatch, unauthorized_root).

source.description: Which gate or check produced this finding.

path.description: File or directory path related to this finding.

timestamp_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this finding was recorded.

artifacts.description: List of artifact paths affected by or evaluated in this run.

registry_refs.description: Registry files referenced during this run.

evidence_refs.description: Evidence references produced or consumed by this run.

type.description: Type of evidence (e.g. sha256, report, log).

hash.description: Hash or checksum of the evidence artifact.

source_of_truth_refs.description: Source-of-truth files or registries consulted during this run.

correlation_id.description: Optional correlation ID for linking related gate runs across a workflow.

parent_run_id.description: Optional reference to a previous run (e.g. re-run after fix).

commit_sha.description: Optional git commit SHA that was evaluated.

pr_number.description: Optional pull request number associated with this run.
